import os
import json

# 查看codex的输出文件
codex_dir = "/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/yfd-agent-consensus/results/agent_consensus_batch/default_run/task_31_triple_timeframe_macd/revised/codex"
claudecode_dir = "/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/yfd-agent-consensus/results/agent_consensus_batch/default_run/task_31_triple_timeframe_macd/revised/claudecode"

print("=== CODEX OUTPUT ===")
codex_output = os.path.join(codex_dir, "triple_timeframe_macd.txt")
if os.path.exists(codex_output):
    with open(codex_output, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
        print(f"File size: {len(content)} chars")
        print(f"First 1000 chars:\n{content[:1000]}")
else:
    print("File not found")

print("\n=== CLAUDECODE OUTPUT ===")
claudecode_output = os.path.join(claudecode_dir, "triple_timeframe_macd.txt")
if os.path.exists(claudecode_output):
    with open(claudecode_output, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
        print(f"File size: {len(content)} chars")
        print(f"First 1000 chars:\n{content[:1000]}")
else:
    print("File not found")

# 查看代码文件
print("\n=== CODEX CODE ===")
codex_code = os.path.join(codex_dir, "triple_timeframe_macd_revised.py")
if os.path.exists(codex_code):
    with open(codex_code, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        code = f.read()
        print(f"Code size: {len(code)} chars")
        # 检查关键函数
        has_macd = "calculate_macd" in code
        has_ma = "ma20" in code.lower() or "20均线" in code
        has_weekly = "weekly" in code.lower() or "周线" in code
        has_monthly = "monthly" in code.lower() or "月线" in code
        print(f"Has MACD calc: {has_macd}, Has MA20: {has_ma}, Has weekly: {has_weekly}, Has monthly: {has_monthly}")
else:
    print("Code file not found")

print("\n=== CLAUDECODE CODE ===")
claudecode_code = os.path.join(claudecode_dir, "triple_timeframe_macd_analysis.py")
if os.path.exists(claudecode_code):
    with open(claudecode_code, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        code = f.read()
        print(f"Code size: {len(code)} chars")
        has_macd = "calculate_macd" in code
        has_ma = "ma20" in code.lower() or "20均线" in code or "calculate_ma" in code
        has_weekly = "weekly" in code.lower() or "周线" in code
        has_monthly = "monthly" in code.lower() or "月线" in code
        print(f"Has MACD calc: {has_macd}, Has MA20: {has_ma}, Has weekly: {has_weekly}, Has monthly: {has_monthly}")
else:
    print("Code file not found")

print(json.dumps(vote_result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
